videos.title: Cross Skiing in Lapland - Pallas Yllastunturi National Park - Photo Travel - Day 5 - Day of Wonders
videos.description:
Fifth video of a mini series about this week spent cross-country skiing in the wonderful environment of the Pallas Yllastunturi National Park, living in huts, laughing around a campfire, learning traditions and culture of the astonishing Saami people.
This is NOT a professional grade video. 
This video is related to my blog https://thenorthtraveller.it/articoli/ and it is just a refresh of an old series of quick pics and GoPro footages to give you an idea of what such beautiful places are there in the Northern Europe. 
I suggest you to use this videos (the whole series about Lapland) in combination with my blog articles where I describe photographic techniques, equipment, uses, traditions and culture of that wonderful place. 
The video is entirely taken while moving with skis or snowshoes at -30°C with a full backpack during an itinerant travel in the Pallas Yllastunturi national park. 
In this particular video (and related articles) you'll find:
- Great landscapes pictures
- One of the most beautiful hut of the park
- Incredible sunlight colors
Please visit my web page https://thenorthtraveller.it/ and my socials
FB EMTheNorthTraveller
IG TheNorthTraveller

videos.title: Ylläs - Pallas Ski Trip (With Hill Climb Racing Events)
videos.description:
Ski trip (2018) to Ylläs and Pallas in Finnish Lapland. There we took the opportunity to back country ski in the Ylläs area and downhill ski in Ylläs and Pallas. It was the end of the season and in Ylläs there were some crazy events going on such as motor sledge racing and cross-country skiing up to the mountain top. Those skiers were some fit athletes I have to say that.

Music
Kari Kaunonen

you

videos.title: Cross-country Skiing in Pello Lapland - Arctic Circle - skier's Arctic paradise in Finland
videos.description:
Europe Video Production travel films: Cross-Country Skiing in Pello, Lapland – Discover Finland’s Arctic Circle Skiing Paradise

Join us on an unforgettable winter adventure as we explore cross-country skiing in Pello, Lapland – one of Finland’s hidden gems at the Arctic Circle. Pello is known as the Cross-Country Skiing Capital of Finland, offering pristine snowy landscapes, well-maintained trails, and breathtaking wilderness views. With over six months of guaranteed snow and approximately 240 km of professionally maintained skiing tracks, Pello is a dream destination for skiing enthusiasts, families, and beginners alike. Whether you prefer classic skiing or skate skiing, you’ll find trails for every level – from easy forest routes to more challenging fell terrain.

Discover the magic of Finnish Lapland: ski under the Northern Lights, experience the tranquillity of Arctic nature, and enjoy cosy local cafés and accommodations along the trails. Pello also offers other exciting winter activities like reindeer safaris, ice fishing, and snowshoeing, making it the perfect destination for an authentic Arctic holiday.

📍 Plan your next cross-country skiing holiday in Pello, Finnish Lapland:
👉 More information about skiing in Pello: https://travelpello.fi/en/activity/cross-country-skiing-lapland-finland/
👉 For more travel films about Pello, Lapland, and Finland, visit: https://europevideoproductions.com/

Don’t forget to like, comment, and subscribe for more inspiring travel videos about Finland, Lapland, and the Arctic Circle! 🇫🇮❄️🎿 #Pello #Lapland #CrossCountrySkiing #Finland #ArcticCircle #WinterHoliday #EuropeVideoProductions

videos.title: NUTS YLLÄS PALLAS 2022 After Movie
videos.description:
NUTS YLLÄS PALLAS 2022
After Movie 🎥 🎬  Rami Valonen
Seuraavan kerran | Next 7.–8.7.2023
videos.transcript:
[Music]
to run the fellows of lapland is to
become deeply immersed in its nature
an experience like no other
it begins with a single footfall
the starting beat of a rhythm
one that will carry both mind and body
on a journey through a timeless land
surrounded by ancient forests whose
trees have stood proudly in their places
for hundreds of years the steps turn
into kilometers
and the stresses of the daily world fade
and dull
life shrinks down
and becomes only what is right before
your
eyes in the soft summer light of the
nightless night an unmissable feeling of
camaraderie develops between the runners
those who were just strangers at the
starting line
now see each other as companions
helping to encourage and spur each other
on
to follow their own journeys
the vast open spaces and vistas that
spread out before you further empty the
mind
silent lakes
lying content and undisturbed are passed
with reverence
while the babbling waterways that flow
and carve their way through the
landscape bring excitement and nourish
the spirit
when the final fell is descended and the
earthy trails give way to roads
it ends as it began
with a single step
but even after the finish line when the
celebrations are long over
the feelings of adventure remain
the challenges
the joy
the contentment and the grit
the spirit of lapland
[Applause]
oh
you

videos.title: Det här loppet knäckte mig – NUTS Ylläs Pallas 2025 | Jakten på 100 Miles #7
videos.description:
Jag försökte springa 100 miles i finska Lappland under midnattssolen. Men NUTS Ylläs Pallas 2025 blev inte som jag hade tänkt mig. Det här loppet knäckte mig. Jag kämpade i över 15 timmar – men efter 89 km missade jag reptiden och tvingades bryta. Här är min berättelse.

💬 Följ mig på sociala medier för fler uppdateringar och behind-the-scenes-innehåll:
* Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/axelpasprang/
* Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/axel.kaijalainen/
* TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@axelpasprang
* Strava: https://www.strava.com/athletes/84873881

📩 För sponsring eller samarbeten, skicka ett mejl till: axelkaijalainen@gmail.com  

Glöm inte att gilla, kommentera och prenumerera! 🔔  

Häng på — vi löser det längs vägen.

00:00 Intro  
00:52 Starten  
01:30 Första vätskestationen  
03:05 Andra vätskestationen – familj på plats  
08:01 Dropbag – vätskestation 3  
10:10 Paincave & DNF  
13:10 Outro

videos.title: NUTS Ylläs Pallas 100 km - Ett nybörjarförsök
videos.description: Med mycket entusiasm, två år av träning och en tidigare ultramarathon på 66 km i bagaget testade jag om kroppen och huvudet skulle fixa ett lopp på 100 kilometer i Lapplands majestätiska natur. Loppet sträckte sig från Pallas i norr till Ylläs i södern, och innehöll flera branta stigningar och djupa nedförsbackar. Här följer mina erfarenheter av ett lopp som blev ett minne för livet.

videos.title: NUTS Ylläs Pallas 2017 trailer
videos.description: 14-15 Jul 2017 Ylläs-Pallas-Hetta, Finland. 26 km, 55 km and 134 km trail run. Registration opens 22 Nov 2016.

videos.title: NUTS Ylläs Pallas 55k
videos.description:
Finaly, better late than never ;) Team U-Freeski's "older" members running the NUTS Ylläs-Pallas route from Pallastunturi to Hettatunturi!
